t0_signal: Snowpack finished far below normal and soil moisture is already depleted across the basin. Reservoir operators say carryover storage is weaker than last year.
t1_signal: A severe early heatwave arrived, emergency water restrictions were delayed, and orchard stress is rising as reservoir levels fall toward critical thresholds.
